'''Bandigos''' (also called '''Bandingos'''<ref name="NH">''[[Lords of Nal Hutta]]''</ref>) were a species of vicious omnivore commonly found within [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur's]] [[Temptation Canyon]]. They resembled large, dog-like creatures with four clawed-legs and wrinkled skin. They were widely known for their long, sinister howls—which many [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] falsely believed to be produced by [[Water Nymph]]s living within the canyon.

Bandigos lived in the sand, and often ambushed their prey by hiding under a thin layer of sand until the prey got close enough to capture.

{{Creature-stub}}
